methodology.bot_filter: rank 7/8 paired players excluded from all rankings
methodology.unknown_filter: unknown heroes/cards/equipment excluded from reference statistics
methodology.equipment_normalization: 核选 prefix removed for equipment identity; selected rate retained
methodology.jiujiu_rule: X啾啾 adds +1 to bond X when X exists in dict_bond
methodology.play_style_rule: level<=6 is reroll; level>=8 without any low-cost 3-star is high-cost; level 7 follows low-cost main carry
methodology.card_order: cards are ordered by slot_index; cards[0] is treated as the first/duo card
methodology.card_prefix_ranking: single/first-card rankings are grouped by card template prefix (彩/黄/蓝/白/其他) and ranked within each group
methodology.team_rank: per match, teams are ranked 1..N by each team's best individual rank

recency_weighting.note: 批次日期来自 path 中的 screenshots.MMDD；均分/胜率/前四率按加权样本计算，样本阈值仍看原始 n。
